description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a dark brown finish and a flat top surface. The front features a symmetrical arrangement of six drawers, each equipped with metallic bar handles, and a central compartment that may be a door or a larger drawer. The drawers vary in size, with three on each side and one in the center, some of which are shown partially open, revealing their depth. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain texture visible throughout. The handles are metallic and slightly curved, providing a comfortable grip for opening the drawers. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for storing documents or office supplies in an urban environment such as an office or administrative building.
description: A large, dark brown wooden filing cabinet with six drawers and metallic bar handles, featuring a flat top and a sturdy build. The front displays a symmetrical drawer layout, ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wooden panel and two drawers partially open, revealing their depth.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all six drawers, some open, with metallic handles and a central compartment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a single drawer partially open and a plain wooden panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back panel.
